markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review the content audit and align on a new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Shift:** The content strategy will shift from highly technical engineering standards to more accessible, situational topics (e.g., investigation processes). This mitigates legal risk from unverified claims and broadens audience appeal.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**New BES Strategy:** A scalable, programmatic content pillar will be created for BES, focusing on state-specific building code updates (e.g., "2026 Florida Building Codes"). This targets high-intent search traffic and aligns with Rimkus's Florida market push.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2273.0)
  - [**Improved Readability:** New content will be more digestible by using natural language and expanding on introductory scenarios throughout the article. A "TLDR" summary will be added to all posts to boost AEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2098.0)
  - [**Performance:** SEO performance is strong (34 of 40 new blogs getting clicks, high engaged sessions). The strategy shift is expected to improve these metrics further.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit Feedback

  - [The recent content audit successfully improved quality by addressing recurring issues.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Primary Concern:** The content's highly technical focus on engineering standards and legal vetting.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
      - [**Risk:** Unverified claims create legal exposure. A past instance involved a client being questioned in a deposition about a specific process mentioned in a Rimkus blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [**Audience Mismatch:** The technical depth is inaccessible to lay audiences (e.g., Florida condo owners) and risks alienating technical experts who might spot inaccuracies.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [**Forensics (Jen):**](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [**Shift:** From technical standards to accessible, situational topics.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Focus:** Investigation processes, common problems, and what to expect from an inspection.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
      - [**Topics:** Align with key practice areas: Global Energy (industrial, renewables) and Transportation.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
      - [**Source Material:** Use Rimkus expert webinars to create AI-summarized artifacts, ensuring technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**BES (Nohora):**](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2273.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Create a scalable, programmatic content pillar for building codes.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2273.0)
      - [**Format:** A central pillar page linking to state-specific "spoke" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture high-intent search traffic for queries like "2026 building code updates Florida."](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)
      - [**Alignment:** Supports Rimkus's push into the Florida market, targeting senior condo owners with relevant safety information.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)

### Readability & SEO Enhancements

  - [**Intros:** Expand on introductory scenarios throughout the article to maintain reader engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2481.0)
  - [**Tone:** Use more natural, digestible language.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [**"TLDR" Summaries:** Add a "Too Long; Didn't Read" summary to the top of all posts.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2098.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Boosts AEO by providing direct answers for Google's featured snippets.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
  - [**Performance:** Current SEO metrics are strong (34 of 40 new blogs getting clicks, high engaged sessions). The strategy shift is expected to improve these results.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
      - [Sync with Lawrence to implement the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
      - [Pause revisions on the two remaining technical articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
      - [Draft a revised "engineering standards" article for Jen's review.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
      - [Share a draft BES building code article and template with Nohora.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)
  - [**Nohora:**](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
      - [Share the 2026 email marketing campaign plan with Matt.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
      - [Access Looker using the shared `rimkus.com` Google account.](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
  - [**Jen:**](https://fathom.video/share/KCdqAeriHoitsA_wSZhFY8PsregTijws?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
